products.title: Cinnamon Rolls
products.description:
Pillowy-soft brioche rolled with a rich, spiced filling and topped with a luxurious cream cheese frosting.

Ingredients: flour, whole milk, brown sugar, butter, powdered sugar, cream cheese, egg, white sugar, cinnamon, salt, yeast, vanilla extract.

products.title: Chocolate Walnut Biscotti
products.description:
Crunchy chocolate biscuit studded with walnuts. An elegant accompaniment to tea or coffee!

Ingredients: flour, brown sugar, walnuts, white sugar, cocoa, egg, baking soda, salt, dark chocolate.

products.title: Garlic Knots
products.description:
These soft and buttery garlic rolls are "knot" your average dinner roll.

Ingredients: flour, whole milk, butter, egg, white sugar, salt, yeast, garlic powder, fresh garlic, parsley flakes.

products.title: Blueberry Morning Bun
products.description:
Delicate brioche filled with jammy blueberries and slightly sweet streusel. A refined breakfast treat.

Ingredients: flour, whole milk, blueberries, butter, egg, white sugar, brown sugar, salt, yeast, cornstarch, lemon juice.

products.title: Anise Orange Biscotti
products.description:
Crisp biscuit flavoured with crushed anise seeds and an orange-scented drizzle.

Ingredients: flour, white sugar, butter, egg, powdered sugar, orange juice, baking powder, salt, anise seeds, orange zest.
